data.title: ELEMARA All-Terrain Stroller Wagon for 2 Kids, Foldable Kids Wagon Stroller Includes Removable Canopy,Mosquito net, Adjustabl

features: ONE-HAND ADJUSTABLE PUSH
PULL HANDLE: Easily adjust the handle height with one hand for different heights of parents. Moreover
the 0-90° adjustable pull handle with 2 available heights allows parents to enjoy effortless control with this versatile stroller. Push your wagon stroller on smooth paths or pull it over sand
grass
or slopes.

Lightweight and Foldable Stroller Wagon: Folds up easily with the push of a button on either side for storage-fitting most car trunks. 2 cushioned seats with 3-point adjustable safety harnesses to keep the little ones secure. and provides tons of space when using as a beach cart or utility cart. Weight: 35 lbs. Folded: 24.02”x 17.33”x ”(L x W x H)
Assembled: 39.37”x 17.71”x 44.88” (L x W x H) (with canopy)
Holds 50 lbs. per seat
100 lbs.
Wagon With Canopy and Mosquito Net: Sliding
detachable UV-protection canopy protects little ones from sun and rain. and allows you to adjust the canopy for the angle of the sun
Canopy is machine washable. In addition
the mosquito net that comes with it can also serve as a reliable insect-proof barrier when going outdoors. This double wagon stroller is ideal for traveling
shopping or camping with your kids. It’s also the perfect gift for birthdays
Christmas
and new parents.

All-Terrain Wheels ＆ Anti-Shock System for Smooth Ride: This kids wagon for toddlers equipped with All terrain non-skid tires and its impact resistance system to adapt to rugged all outdoor terrain. —just what little explorers need! One-step back footbrake for ultimate control. Heavy-duty
rust-resistant steel frame ensures long-lasting use- perfect for growing families.
TONS OF STORAGE FOR ALL ESSENTIALS: Each wagon comes with an Large expandable basket
parent organizer
and a detachable child's tray with cup holders for snacks and drinks. This wagon for kids offers a stable
long-lasting design that withstands everyday use
making it a reliable choice for families.
